member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.ContactClassifier
member.summary: Deduplicates extracted clients by email (preferred) or normalized name, and assigns PipelineStage based on highest-evidence document type found in their associated documents.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.ContactClassifier.DetermineStage(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.DocumentType})
member.summary: Determines the PipelineStage for a contact based on the highest-evidence document type. Priority: ClosingStatement → Closed, PurchaseContract → UnderContract, ListingAgreement/BuyerAgreement → ActiveClient, else → Lead.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.ContactClassifier.ClassifyAndDedup(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.ExtractedClient,RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.DocumentReference}})
member.summary: Deduplicates a flat list of (client, documentReference) pairs. Dedup key: email (case-insensitive, preferred) or normalized name. Returns classified ImportedContact records with merged documents and assigned stage.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.ContactDetectionActivity
member.summary: Orchestrates contact detection from Drive document extractions and Gmail inbox emails. Flattens Drive extraction clients, splits inbox by lead-generator vs general, parses lead-gen emails via regex, sends general emails to Claude in batches, then merges, deduplicates, and classifies all contacts.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.ContactDetectionActivity.ExecuteAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.DocumentExtraction},RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.EmailCorpus,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Detects and classifies contacts from Drive document extractions and inbox emails.
member.param: Document extractions from the agent's Google Drive.
The agent's Gmail corpus (inbox + sent emails + signature).
member.returns: Classified and deduplicated list of imported contacts.

member.name: F:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.ContactDetectionDiagnostics.ContactsImported
member.summary: Number of contacts imported, tagged by pipeline stage. Tag key: "stage" with values "Lead", "ActiveClient", "UnderContract", "Closed".

member.name: F:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.ContactDetectionDiagnostics.DuplicatesMerged
member.summary: Number of duplicate contacts merged during classification.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.EmailContactExtractor
member.summary: Extracts contacts from general inbox emails by sending batches of 20 to Claude Sonnet. Uses <user-data> tags to prevent prompt injection.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.EmailContactExtractor.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.External.IAnthropicClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.EmailContactExtractor})
member.summary: Extracts contacts from general inbox emails by sending batches of 20 to Claude Sonnet. Uses <user-data> tags to prevent prompt injection.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.EmailContactExtractor.ExtractAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.EmailMessage},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Batches the provided emails in groups of 20 and sends each batch to Claude Sonnet for contact extraction. Returns all extracted clients across all batches.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.LeadGeneratorPatterns
member.summary: Regex-based detection and parsing for lead generator platform emails. Covers 12 known platforms: TruLead, Zillow, Realtor.com, BoldLeads, CincPro, kvCORE, Inside Real Estate, Ylopo, Real Geeks, BoomTown, Follow Up Boss, Sierra.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.LeadGeneratorPatterns.IsLeadGeneratorEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the from address matches a known lead generator platform domain.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.LeadGeneratorPatterns.GetPlatformName(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the human-readable platform name for the given from address, or null if the domain is not a known lead generator.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Activities.Lead.ContactDetection.LeadGeneratorPatterns.ParseLeadFromEmail(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parses a lead contact from a lead generator email using regex extraction. Extracts Name/Email/Phone from the body; falls back to subject line for name. Returns null if no name can be extracted.
